1819820.name: Puppet Master
1819820.description:
Who is the puppet master of your country

You alone, voiceless, and in a sea of global corporate corruption and media propaganda! What can you do, well... fight back! We are already at the bottom of the power structure in greater numbers but what's at the top? who is at the top? Time to find out by infiltrating the power structure and fighting your way up the ranks. The question is can you ever get to the top and if so what will you see when you are there?

Simple but fun player control and movement, there is just something fun about the simplicity of flinging a humanoid ragdoll around.



Choose from different countries to fight in all with their own unique enemies and boss. Enemies also have unique traits that can both benefit you and harm you. The more you play and level up the more the enemies scale in strength and numbers, there is no end!



Every time you win you will earn more and more in-game currency called crip-toe. You will also unlock new abilities and cosmetics. There are unique ability bracelets that you can unlock and customize on your character. For example, you might place a bracelet on a limb you know you have less chance of losing, as if you lose a limb with a bracelet you lose the power that bracelet gave you. So you will need to strategize what bracelets to use in certain fights and where those bracelets should be placed on your character.



The enemy scaling system in Puppet Master is built to keep on increasing AI strength and difficulty the more you play and skill up. This means the levels and rounds you play will increasingly get more difficult with more variations of enemies. There will be a global scoring system where you can rank but no one can really reach the top as there is no top, just another pyramid of power you will need to climb.
